ValidationRule.description: Just these profiles can can re-assign contacts: Sales Admin Information Manager, Sales Admin Process Manager, TSG Sales, & CBDO
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( OwnerId ) && NOT(($Profile.Name = "CBDO" || $Profile.Name = "TSG Sales" || $Profile.Name = "Sales Admin Information Manager" || $Profile.Name = "Sales Admin Process Manager" || $Profile.Name = "System Administrator" || $Permission.Data_Quality))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to reassign Contacts. You may request Sales Operations or the CBDO to perform the reassignment for you.
